mapper.sql: mcm.contractpartnermatchingid AS id ,mcm.matching_text AS matchingText ,mcm.mcp_contractpartnerid AS mcpContractpartnerId ,mcm.mmf_comment AS mmfComment ,mcm.mpa_postingaccountid AS mpaPostingAccountId ,last_used AS lastUsed
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM contractpartnermatchings AS mcm JOIN vw_contractpartners AS mcp ON mcp.contractpartnerid = mcm.mcp_contractpartnerid AND mar_mau_userid = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN maf_validfrom AND maf_validtil AND #{bookingDate} BETWEEN mcp.validfrom AND mcp.validtil WHERE POSITION(matching_text IN #{searchString}) > 0 FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT
FROM contractpartnermatchings AS mcm JOIN vw_contractpartners AS mcp ON mcp.contractpartnerid = mcm.mcp_contractpartnerid AND mar_mau_userid = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN maf_validfrom AND maf_validtil

SELECT
FROM contractpartnermatchings AS mcm JOIN vw_contractpartners AS mcp ON mcp.contractpartnerid = mcm.mcp_contractpartnerid AND mar_mau_userid = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN maf_validfrom AND maf_validtil WHERE mcm.contractpartnermatchingid = #{id}
